title: SellMod
description: Helps in selling items by interacting with server-provided sell GUIs using player-like inventory interactions.
body:
# SellMod

**SellMod** is a Fabric **client-side mod** for Minecraft **1.21.X → 26.1.X** that streamlines selling items on servers using **plugin-based sell GUIs**.

---

## 🚀 What does SellMod do?

SellMod automates the exact actions a player would perform when selling items:

- Opens a server-provided sell GUI using a configurable command  
- Transfers items from your inventory into the sell GUI using real slot interactions  
- Respects GUI rules (no illegal packet tricks)  
- Closes the GUI to trigger sell-on-close mechanics used by many servers  

All actions are performed client-side and mimic legitimate player input.

---

## ✨ Key Features

- **Configurable Sell Command**  
  Works with `/sell`, `/sellgui`, or any custom server command  

- **Adjustable Transfer Speed**  
  Control how fast items are moved  

- **Randomized Delay Between Sell Cycles**  
  Adds variation to avoid command spam  

- **Plugin GUI Compatible**  
  Works with chest-style sell GUIs from server plugins  

- **SHIFT & PICKUP Transfer Modes**  
  Supports both QUICK_MOVE and manual slot logic  

- **Transfer Burst System**  
  Move multiple stacks per tick for fast selling  

- **Client-Side Only**  
  No server mods required  

---

## 📊 Analytics (Optional)

SellMod includes **opt-in anonymous analytics**.

When enabled, it sends:
- Server IP  
- Server Software (Paper, Spigot, etc.)  
- SellMod Version  
- A random client ID (for Unique Users)

**No personal data is collected.**

View the public dashboard:  
👉 https://sellmod-analytics.onrender.com/dashboard  

---

## ⚙️ How it works

SellMod simulates real player behavior:

- Clicks inventory slots using standard screen handlers  
- Moves items into valid container slots  
- Adapts to GUI layouts and restrictions  
- Avoids unsupported or unsafe interactions  

---

## ⚠️ Important Notes

- **The mod transfers your entire inventory**  
  Keep important items (tools, armor, valuables) out before enabling  

- **Behavior depends on server GUI design**  
  Some servers may restrict selling or slot usage  

- **High burst values increase interaction rate**  
  Reduce speed if your server has strict limits  

---

## 🛠 Requirements

- Fabric Loader **0.18+**  
- Fabric API  
- Cloth Config  
- Mod Menu  

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Install Fabric Loader and required dependencies  
2. Place SellMod and dependencies in your `mods` folder  
3. Configure via **Mod Menu → SellMod**  
4. Bind a key and start selling  

---

## 💬 Support / Feedback

- Discord Server: https://dsc.gg/gaurangstudios  
- GitHub Issues: https://github.com/Gaurang-Studios/SellMod/issues  

---

## ⚖️ Disclaimer

SellMod does **not** modify server behavior.  
It only automates actions a player could manually perform.

Use responsibly and follow server rules.
